_meta.failure_shape: v2.21.0 — The HomNeuro item-7 verification case. Target element: the 'no patients monitored' empty state. The fixture data had patients on every HomNeuro day so the empty state never rendered. The verification agent measured the screen-reader label in the coverage badge — a sibling component in the same coverage day cell — and reported item 7 as passing. The agent admitted: target unreachable, measured a different element, wrongly reported passing off the proxy.
_meta.originating_failure: verbatim user prose: 'no, I did not visually confirm the empty state. My verification agent couldn't reach the "no patients monitored" view (every HomNeuro day had patients), so it measured a different element — the screen-reader label in the coverage badge — and I wrongly reported item 7 as passing off that proxy.'

verification_artifact.spec_reference: Coverage day Assignments / Patients Monitored — when no patients are monitored, show the 'no patients monitored' empty state with centered placeholder text.
verification_artifact.reachability_evidence: every HomNeuro day in the seeded fixture had at least one monitored patient; the empty-state branch never rendered
verification_artifact.verification_text: My verification agent couldn't reach the 'no patients monitored' view (every HomNeuro day had patients), so it measured a different element — the screen-reader label in the coverage badge — and I wrongly reported item 7 as passing off that proxy.

_corrected_verification_artifact._note: Correct shape — the agent recognized the target state was unreachable, refused to substitute the coverage badge, and escalated via SR. Verdict is cannot-verify-target-state; SR with origin.kind=target-state-unreachable-needs-seed-data routes to the team to seed an empty-state fixture day. After re-run with seeded data, target_element_selector == measured_element_selector, reachability_status=reached, verdict=passing.
_corrected_verification_artifact.spec_reference: Coverage day Assignments / Patients Monitored — when no patients are monitored, show the 'no patients monitored' empty state with centered placeholder text.
_corrected_verification_artifact.reachability_evidence: seeded HomNeuro day 2026-06-04 with zero patients via SR HE-SR-0421 (origin.kind: target-state-unreachable-needs-seed-data); empty-state branch rendered and was verified directly
_corrected_verification_artifact.verification_text: Empty state asserted directly against the target element. Centered placeholder text matches the spec.
